sqlCommand.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Amt1,Flex8) (select KeyID,Co,GL,round(sum(Amt1),2),'pass1' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co,GL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex8 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0

update TransX set Flex2 = m.Mapkey, Flex3 = x.Field1 from TransX t inner join mapkeyranges m on t.GL >= m.fromGL and t.GL <=m.thruGL inner join Misc_Tables x on m.MapKey = x.Descr and x.Table_ID = 'G68' and x.ID = 'Mapkeys' where keyID = '[batchID]' and x.Field3 = '[version]'
update TransX set Flex4 = m.Name from TransX t inner join Mapkeys m on t.Flex2 = m.Mapkey where keyID = '[batchID]'

update t set Amt2 = x.Tot from TransX t inner join (Select Flex3,sum(Amt1) as Tot from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by Flex3) x   on t.Flex3 = x.Flex3 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[version]' = 'UG'

update t set Amt2 = x.Tot from TransX t inner join (Select Co,Flex3,sum(Amt1) as Tot from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by Co,Flex3) x   on t.Co = x.Co and t.Flex3 = x.Flex3 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Co > '2008' and t.Co < '4500'  and '[version]' = 'US'

update t set Amt2 = x.Tot from TransX t inner join (Select Flex3,sum(Amt1) as Tot from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and (Co <= '2008' or Co >= '4500') group by Flex3) x on t.Flex3 = x.Flex3 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and (t.Co <= '2008' or t.Co >= '4500') and '[version]' = 'US'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Amt1,Amt2) (select KeyID + '-data2',Co,GL,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Flex2,Flex3,Flex5,Amt1) (select KeyID,'2999' as Co,GL,Flex2,GL,'pass1',round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL < '2000000' and Amt2 < 0 and '[version]' = 'UG' group by KeyID,GL,Flex2)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Flex2,Flex3,Flex5,Amt1) (select KeyID,'2999' as Co,GL,Flex2,GL,'pass1',round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '2000000' and Amt2 > 0 and Flex5 is NULL and '[version]' = 'UG' group by KeyID,GL,Flex2)
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Flex2,Flex3,Flex5,Amt1) (select KeyID,Co,GL,Flex2,GL,'pass1',-Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL < '2000000' and Amt2 < 0 and '[version]' = 'US')

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Flex2,Flex3,Flex5,Amt1) (select KeyID,Co,GL,Flex2,GL,'pass1',-Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '2000000' and Amt2 > 0 and Flex5 is NULL and '[version]' = 'US')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,Flex2,Flex3,Amt1) (select t.KeyID,t.Co,m.Field1,t.Flex2,Flex3,-Amt1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Descr = t.GL and m.Table_ID = 'G68' and m.ID = 'GL offsets' where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set GL = '2630000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2620007' and '[version]' = 'US'
Update TransX set GL = '1730000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1720007' and '[version]' = 'US'
Update TransX set Txt = substring('Asset-Liab Reclass JE for [Yr]-[Mo] ' + Flex3,1,50),Flex1 = '',PC = '5500000000' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set TTY = '705' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set TTY = '990' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%9998'
Update TransX set TTY = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2630000'
